rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in implementation scope when binding to implementation-specific ports or outputs.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component boundaries by aligning annex scope with the granularity of the target (type vs implementation).
Ensure contract elements reference only features visible at the target scope level.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use boolean expressions with >=, <=, and logical conjunctions to define numeric ranges.
Declare helper predicates as bool-typed equations for range checks.
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing subcomponent ports directly in component-type annexes without intermediate port mapping.
